title: **Share your monday AI use cases ✨ Help shape 2025's features**

posts.author: Shai_monday (Shai Passal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Share your monday AI use cases Help shape 2025’s features

Hey all, i’m Shai from the AI team at monday

We’re taking a moment to reflect on all the amazing ways you’ve used monday AI capabilities throughout 2024. Your innovative applications of our tools have blown us away, and we’d love to hear your use cases as we plan our roadmap for the new year.

Looking back at 2024, could you share your example of how our AI features impacted your work process?

We’d especially love to know:

  1. What specific use cases are you using the monday AI capabilities for?

  2. How has it impacted your work process (on monday or beyond)?

  3. Has it replaced any manual processes or tools you used before?

Your year-end reflection will help us prioritize features you’ll love!

posts.author: afash (Anthony)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Shai_monday,

I use monday ai to help extract information from columns into another especially subitem columns to main items. There are a lot of formulas on my board.

Also, I use to it to summarise content of a emotion feedback within our surveys. This helps save time during busy periods and understand what comments require the most urgent response or resolution.
